chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.37 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hg. of main case 12.05.2025 Mr. Khalid Hussain Chandio, advocate for applicant Mr. Sardar Ahmed, DPG ----- By consent this application is allowed on the ground that trial Court viz. X-Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi is lying vacant, Special Case No.545/2021 & Special Case No.545-A/2021 are withdrawn from X-Anti- Terrorism Court, Karachi and is transferred to the Court of learned XI-Anti- Terrorism Court, Karachi for disposal according to law. This Cr. Transfer Application is disposed of. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
